name: Dr. Claudia Aichinger
description: Working intensively with children, young people and adults gives me an incredible amount of pleasure. Orthodontics never gets boring because it is constantly evolving.

name: Dr. Shadi Loutfi
description: I really enjoy working with patients who appreciate what we do and are happy with the result of their treatment.

name: Dr. Katharina Zifko
description: I became more and more interested in orthodontics during my dental studies and I am pleased to support the great team.

name: Brigitte
description: I have been working in the practice since it opened. I take care of the finances and I am very happy to help with any kind of request.

name: Grace
description: I studied dentistry in the Philippines and have been working as an orthodontic assistant since 2005.

name: Nadja
description: I have been working as an orthodontic assistant since 2006. I particularly enjoy working with children.

name: Semanur
description: I have been working as an orthodontic assistant since 2013. The varied activities are a lot of fun.

name: Nazdana
description: I have been working as an orthodontic assistant since 2013. My top priority is patient satisfaction.
